notes: Probe-validated: 568 speeches via sitemap; sampled 2011..2026 (true floor unpinned - see issue #57, --spread never reaches the oldest items). country=Denmark; source_url=https://www.kongehuset.dk/taler/; region=Europe; iso3n=208; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | TWO TRAPS: (1) /taler/ IS NOT A LISTING - it is a single speech page (canonical /taler/<slug>); there is no speech index to crawl, hence sitemap. (2) the on-page 'load more' drives an Umbraco endpoint (/umbraco/api/blogapi/loadmorerelatedcontentstreamarticles) that returns the RELATED-CONTENT stream - Instagram reels, photo galleries, press releases - NOT speeches; an api recipe on it would harvest the palace's social feed. DATE IS THE PUBLICATION DATE ('Offentliggjort den ...'): usually within days of delivery, but one sampled speech was published 3 MONTHS late (delivered 2017-02-05, published 2017-05-03). Delivery date is often in the title but not reliably -> left to the cleaner's corrected-date pass. Multi-speaker household archive (King, Queen, Crown Princess, Prince Henrik) -> position and speaker_default BOTH omitted. Some speeches are in English inside the Danish tree. Excluded siblings: /nyheder (2,030), /presse (339), /kalender (7,713 diary entries, NOT speeches).
